summary: Tested 3 new features: User Groups (Pro/Teams), Leads/Prospecting CRM, and Task creation modal cleanup (no notes/category + new DateTimePicker). Backend: 20/20 pytest tests pass covering groups dedupe/duplicate-name/403/CRUD and leads ICP/CRUD/import/counts/owner-isolation, plus a regression test confirming task creation works without note/category. Frontend: Leads page fully validated (ICP guide renders, add/edit/delete/search all work). Free user gating verified - no Manage groups button visible. Pro user Manage groups + DateTimePicker UI exist in code with correct data-testids but the New Task modal failed to open during Playwright automation (likely onboarding overlay interaction issue in headless run); main agent already visually confirmed these. Found a React hydration warning bug.

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration error: <Checkbox> (button element) is nested inside <Button> at TaskHub.js lines 576-577 ('Select' button contains a Checkbox). Console error: '<button> cannot be a descendant of <button>'. This fires on every dashboard render for Pro/Teams users with the Select Tasks button.

passed_tests: Backend Groups: Pro list groups (200)
Backend Groups: Free user create blocked (403)
Backend Groups: Free user list blocked (403)
Backend Groups: emails deduped (case+whitespace+invalid filtered)
Backend Groups: duplicate name case-insensitive rejected (400)
Backend Groups: empty name rejected (400)
Backend Groups: update + delete persistence verified
Backend Groups: update to existing name blocked (400)
Backend Groups: Teams user can create
Backend Groups: delete non-existent returns 404
Backend Leads: ICP guide returns personas/industries/regions
Backend Leads: ICP available to free user
Backend Leads: create + persist via GET
Backend Leads: empty name rejected (400)
Backend Leads: import skips empty names, falls back invalid status to To Call
Backend Leads: update status (valid) + reject invalid status (400)
Backend Leads: status counts present for all 5 statuses + status filter works
Backend Leads: per-owner isolation (free can't see/delete pro's leads)
Backend Leads: delete then verify 404 on second delete
Backend Regression: POST /api/tasks works without note/category
Frontend Leads: page loads, ICP guide renders (personas, industries, regions visible)
Frontend Leads: add lead via dialog, search filter, edit, delete - all work
Frontend Free user: no Manage groups button (correctly gated)
Frontend Free user: no Category field, no Note field, leads page accessible
action_items: Fix hydration warning in TaskHub.js lines 576-577: Replace <Checkbox> inside <Button data-testid='select-tasks-button'> with a non-button visual icon (e.g., the lucide Check icon, or CheckSquare icon), since nesting a button inside a button breaks valid HTML.
critical_code_review_comments: TaskHub.js (940 lines) is approaching the 700-line threshold - consider splitting the New Task modal and Groups modal into their own components for maintainability.
DateTimePicker output format 'yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm' (without timezone) is sent as a plain string to backend - confirm consistent timezone handling vs PST get_pst_now() elsewhere.
Hydration warning (button inside button) at TaskHub.js:576-577 - real bug, should be fixed.
LeadsPage delete uses native window.confirm via dialog handler - acceptable, but consider a shadcn AlertDialog for consistency with the rest of the app.
Leads /api/leads/import accepts unbounded list - consider adding a max items cap for safety (e.g., 5000).

success_rate.frontend: Leads page 100%, Free user gating 100%, Pro user task modal: code verified but modal failed to open in automation (likely onboarding overlay; main agent already visually validated)

test_credentials: From /app/memory/test_credentials.md: prouser@acmecorp.com / owner@acmecorp.com / freeuser@example.org with Password123
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up via teardown in pytest tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/tests/test_groups_and_leads.py covers groups (10 tests), leads (9 tests), and task creation regression (1 test). Run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest tests/test_groups_and_leads.py -v. For Playwright UI tests of the New Task modal, you must aggressively dismiss the onboarding popup (multiple Next/Skip clicks) AND set localStorage flags BEFORE the dashboard loads, or inject the token + onboarding flag before navigation. The hydration warning at TaskHub.js:576-577 (Checkbox inside Button for select-tasks-button) is a real bug but does not break functionality.
